summary: Tested frontend product configurator at /products/photo-prints/polaroid-prints. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Templates in DB have no preview_url set so all template cards show 'No preview' text - this is expected per context note, not a code bug
Add to Cart uses alert() which is a primitive UX - consider a toast notification instead
context_for_next_testing_agent: All product configurator flows working. Homepage loads. Product page at /products/photo-prints/polaroid-prints loads with 4 template cards + No Frame. Template selection shows checkmark. Photo upload triggers Step 3 sandwich preview. Zoom in/out/reset work. Add to Cart button is enabled and shows price.
